summary: Implemented workflow-owned verifier transitions, exact annotated remediation topology resolution, separate observable review/remediation budgets, cross-cycle no-progress accounting, workflow control-stop incident evidence, advisory verifier guidance, preset topology validation, and focused contract regressions.

gapStatuses.requirement: Workflow-owned transition and exact remediation successor
gapStatuses.evidence: GateTransitionDecision distinguishes advancement, verifier evidence retry, passing exit, invalid result, terminal stop, budget exhaustion, and malformed topology; plan routing ignores workflow-specific action metadata.

Review retries and actual remediation node starts/completions are projected separately in checks, terminal manifests, boundedStoryLoop continuation state, and control-stop evidence; repeated signatures accumulate and changed evidence resets the counter.

gapStatuses.requirement: Control-stop incident evidence and actionable skip reasons
gapStatuses.evidence: Incident reconstruction carries optional controlStop without fabricating failedLogicalStepId, including gate/remaining-work refs, reason code, and both consumed budgets.
Expansion rejects partial, non-contiguous, ambiguous, or interleaved remediation topology; injected guidance states that recommendedNextAction is advisory and the workflow owns routing.

Added transition matrix, initial/final/malformed topology, structured events, incident schema/builder, verifier guidance, and preset validation tests. The declared pytest dependencies were installed session-locally and the selected suite passed after correcting one legacy unannotated-topology regression.

targetedLocalChecks.details: The first run completed 363 tests with one legacy unannotated-topology regression; the affected scopes plus replay coverage were rerun after the fix with 131 passing tests.
2 replay and deterministic patch-placement tests passed.
The isolated integration image build stopped before tests because the Docker daemon lacks BuildKit support required by Dockerfile RUN --mount.

targetedLocalChecks.command: python -m compileall -q moonmind api_service tests/unit/workflows/temporal tests/unit/api/test_presets_service.py tests/unit/schemas/test_incident_reconstruction_models.py
direct incident, preset-expansion, transition-matrix, and three-cycle no-progress contract exercises
